title: Benchkit PRs Index
description: Navigation index grouping benchmark runs by pull request number, produced by bench-aggregate.

prNumber.description: Pull request number extracted from the ref.

ref.description: Git ref for this pull request (e.g. refs/pull/42/merge).

latestRunId.description: Run ID of the most recent run for this PR.

latestTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent run for this PR.

latestCommit.description: Commit SHA of the most recent run for this PR.

runCount.description: Total number of runs for this PR.
